title: RASP Engine — Production Middleware Integration & Session Anomaly Alerting
description: rasp_engine.py inspects every inbound HTTP request for SQLi/XSS/CMDi/path-traversal/XXE/SSRF with per-IP rate limiting and session anomaly detection. test_rasp_engine_unit.py validates attack types and protection actions. Gap: RASP is implemented as a standalone class but not wired as FastAPI middleware in the suite-api app, so it does not actually intercept production requests.
missing: FastAPI middleware integration: create RASPMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware) that wraps rasp_engine.inspect_request() and returns 403/redirect on block
Honeypot redirect mode: when RASP detects a scanner/attacker, redirect to the deception_engine honeypot URL and record the attacker's IP and payload
TrustGraph event publishing: when RASP blocks a request, publish a TrustGraph event so the attack pattern is indexed in the knowledge graph
